templates.name: Comic-style hook
templates.description: Bold red/yellow hook with chromatic-split title, halftone backdrop, glass-crack hit, and corner-stamp number. Use for any comic-book, superhero, or pop-culture facts channel.

templates.name: Anime-style Short
templates.description: Pink + cyan chromatic title with speed-line backdrop. Tilted kicker and tagline, scale-pulse on the title. Built for Shorts / Reels / TikTok.

templates.name: Sci-fi declassified
templates.description: Cyan + black 'declassified file' aesthetic with grid + scanlines. Glowing case-file number, monospaced tag. For sci-fi, mystery, and alien-conspiracy niches.

templates.name: Finance long-form intro
templates.description: Neon-green animated counters over black, scanline overlay, sharp typographic hit on the headline number.

templates.name: Sleep-story intro
templates.description: Calm indigo gradient with very slow ken-burns and a soft serif title. No flashes, no fast cuts.

templates.name: History Short
templates.description: Sepia palette with serif title and a parchment grain. Slow whip-pans between beats. Built for TikTok / Reels / Shorts.

templates.name: Scary story Short
templates.description: Deep purple/blue with candle-flicker grain, soft serif title that pulses, slow fades only.

templates.name: Tech tutorial intro
templates.description: Dark gray + cyan accent with monospaced channel name and a quick code-snippet rotation.
